overview.short: Pathampuzha is a small village in the Kottayam district of Kerala state, India.
overview.description: Pathampuzha is a small village in the Kottayam district of Kerala state, India. Aruvikkachal waterfalls is one of the tourist attraction here.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Palackattumala
topPlaces.description: Palackattumala is a village in Kottayam District of Kerala, India with a population of around 1500. An oblong tableland located on a small rolling hill, north of Illickal Junction in Pala – Vaikom road.

topPlaces.name: Kudakkachira
topPlaces.description: Kudakkachira is a small village 9 km away from Palai on Pala-uzhavoor road of Ernakulam - Sabarimala state highway in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is part of Meenachil Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Andoor
topPlaces.description: Andoor is a village in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. The village is located approximately 9 km north-west of Palai on the road towards Kuravilangad.

topPlaces.name: Marangattupilly
topPlaces.description: Marangattupilly is a small village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Vallichira
topPlaces.description: Vallichira is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kanjikkuzhi
topPlaces.description: Kanjikuzhi is a census town in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a suburb of Kottayam City.

topPlaces.name: Kurichithanam
topPlaces.description: Kurichithanam is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. K. R. Narayanan, a former president of India, was born in this village.

topPlaces.name: Uzhavoor
topPlaces.description: Uzhavoor is an expanding town in Kottayam district, Kerala in India. It is just 32 km away from the administrative capital Kottayam District.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pathampuzha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pathampuzha is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pathampuzha?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pathampuzha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pathampuzha?
faq.a: Stays in Pathampuzha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pathampuzha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palackattumala, Kudakkachira, Andoor, Marangattupilly, Vallichira.
